title: Transformer Param
description: Descriptor for one configuration knob a transformer exposes. Returned inside transformer.json `params[]` from list_transformers. The descriptor declares the knob's shape; the buyer supplies its value in build_creative `config` keyed by `field`. For `value_source: enumerable` params (e.g. account-specific voices), the legal `options[]` are account-scoped and dynamic ŌĆö they are returned only when the param's `field` is named in the list_transformers `expand_params` request, and may be paginated via `options_cursor`.

field.description: The config key. Buyers set the value under this exact key in build_creative `config`.

type.description: JSON type of the value the buyer supplies for this field.

value_source.description: Where the legal values come from. `inline` ŌĆö a small closed set listed in `allowed_values` (e.g. mastering_preset). `range` ŌĆö a numeric interval bounded by `minimum`/`maximum` (e.g. speaking_rate). `enumerable` ŌĆö an account-scoped, dynamic set (e.g. voices, including custom/cloned ones) resolved per-credential; values appear in `options[]` only when expanded. `free_text` ŌĆö an open buyer-authored string with no closed/enumerable set (e.g. a negative_prompt or style note for a generative agent); `type` MUST be `string` and `allowed_values`/`minimum`/`maximum`/`options`/`options_cursor` MUST be absent. NOTE: a transformer-param MUST NOT be a generation-count knob (sample_count/n/num_images/count) ŌĆö output count is owned by `max_variants`/`max_creatives`, never config.

max_length.description: Optional maximum character length for a `free_text` param. Omit for no declared limit.

allowed_values.description: The closed set of legal values. Present when `value_source` is `inline`.

minimum.description: Inclusive lower bound. Present when `value_source` is `range`.

maximum.description: Inclusive upper bound. Present when `value_source` is `range`.

options.description: Account-scoped legal values for an `enumerable` param. Populated ONLY when this param's `field` was named in the list_transformers `expand_params` request ŌĆö otherwise omitted (the buyer enumerates on demand). Brief-filtered and paginated; use `options_cursor` for the next page.

value.description: The value the buyer passes in `config` for this field.

metadata.description: Option-specific attributes the buyer can filter or display (e.g. for a voice: language, gender, provider, custom).

options_cursor.description: Opaque pagination cursor for this param's `options[]`. Present when more option values are available than were returned. Pass back to list_transformers (scoped to this transformer + field) to fetch the next page.

default.description: The value applied when the buyer omits this field from `config`. Type matches `type`.

required.description: Whether the buyer MUST supply this field in `config`. When false and no `default` is declared, the agent chooses.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this knob does.

examples.description: Narration voice, including account-specific custom/cloned voices.
Audio mastering profile applied to the final mix.
Open buyer-authored guidance for what the generative agent should avoid (e.g. "no text overlays, no humans").
